title: Software Engineer
description: Designs, develops, and maintains high-quality software solutions. Works with a team of developers to deliver robust and scalable applications.

title: Data Scientist
description: Analyzes large datasets to extract meaningful insights. Builds machine learning models to solve business problems. Requires strong statistical knowledge.

title: Frontend Developer
description: Builds responsive and interactive user interfaces for web applications using modern JavaScript frameworks. Focuses on user experience.

title: DevOps Engineer
description: Manages the software development lifecycle, including continuous integration, deployment, and infrastructure automation. Works with cloud platforms.

title: Project Manager
description: Leads project planning, execution, and delivery. Manages timelines, resources, and stakeholder communication to ensure project success.
